subject: Stonjourner, a large rectangular stone monolith Pokemon with cross-hatched markings, in a dynamic power pose
description: A large, roughly rectangular stone figure stands in a forceful, dynamic pose amid debris and swirling impact effects. The creature's body is composed of heavy stone blocks with cross-hatched or etched markings on its surface. Motion lines and debris radiate outward from its position, suggesting a heavy impact or stomping force. The color palette is warm — amber, rust, and orange — suggesting either a fiery environment or dramatic lighting. The creature is imposing and ancient-looking, evoking standing stone monuments.
foreground: Large rectangular stone Pokemon with etched markings, debris around it
background: Warm amber and orange with debris and motion-lines
emotion: powerful, imposing — weight-bearing stance with impact debris
